steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Text Structure and Purpose question. It asks for the main purpose of the entire passage. Look at what the passage introduces, describes, and concludes to determine its overall function.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — To argue that wooden shipwrecks affect fish more than they do microbial communities: The passage never mentions fish at all; the study compares wood type effects across bacteria, archaea, and fungi. ✗
  • Choice B — To describe how the first shipwreck in the Gulf of Mexico was discovered: The passage mentions HMS Conqueror and two Gulf of Mexico shipwrecks only as the subject of a study, not as a discovery narrative. ✗
  • Choice C — To detail the composition of HMS *Conqueror*: HMS Conqueror is referenced only in the opening sentence to establish context; the passage is not about its composition. ✗
  • Choice D — To provide an overview of a study about the effects of wooden shipwrecks on seafloor microbial communities: The passage presents a research question, methodology (wood samples placed at varying distances), and finding (wood type most influenced bacteria). This is a classic study overview structure. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
